title: Lead Revenue Manager at Barbeque Nation

jsonLd.title: Lead Revenue Manager at Barbeque Nation
jsonLd.description:
Barbeque Nation is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Bengaluru. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Barbeque Nation:
Barbeque Nation is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Barbeque Nation!
